gist.headline: Charting the hive
gist.blurb: We've added some shiny new internal dashboards to help us understand how the ecosystem is growing. Better data means a healthier garden for everyone.
gist.summary: Introduced a new user-intelligence dashboard and updated the tier-simulation dashboard for internal operations.
gist.impact: Maintainers gain improved visibility into platform usage and economics to help optimize resource provisioning.
gist.visual_concept: Monitor Robot displaying charts on its screen, Polly the bee looking at the data with a tiny clipboard. Represents data, analytics, and internal monitoring.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head displaying colorful bar charts, while the tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a small clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head displaying colorful bar charts, while the tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a small clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
